description: Dubai with Abu Dhabi offers an unforgettable blend of modernity, luxury, and tradition in the heart of the UAE. Dubai, known for its futuristic skyline, boasts iconic landmarks such as the Burj Khalifa, the Palm Jumeirah, and the Dubai Mall. Visitors can indulge in world-class shopping, experience thrilling desert safaris, and explore the vibrant culture of the city. Just a short drive away, Abu Dhabi, the capital of the UAE, offers a more relaxed yet equally spectacular experience. Highlights include the awe-inspiring Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, the Louvre Abu Dhabi, and the thrilling Ferrari World amusement park. Together, these two cities combine the best of innovation, culture, and luxury, making them an ideal destination for travelers seeking a unique Middle Eastern adventure.
cost_includes:
Half Day City Tour ( ATLANTIS , BURJ AL ARAB, FUTURE MUSEUM, PALM JUMERAH PHOTO STOP ) 
Burj Khalifa with entrance to 124th floor (ATMOSPHERE LOUNGE WITH GOLD COFFEE) 
Marina Cruise with dinner   
Desert Safari, with Belly Dance and dinner 
Dubai Frame 
1 hr Limo Ride  
One Way Mono Rail Ride  
Abu Dhabi city tour with Ferari World Photo Stop Only ( If You Want Ferari Pass approx. 8000 to 9000 Per person Extra ) 
Abu Dhabi Grand Mosque  
BAPS Hindu Temple  
Return economy class airfare (EX BOM). 
Return airport transfers Dubai // Ras Al Khaimah/Abu Dhabi Airport depending as per flight details. 
Hotel accommodation in 4 star Hotel as per selected options with daily breakfast provided by hotel. 
Total 05 Dinners including on Marina cruise & Desert safari BBQ. 
Total 05 Breakfast at hotel, Lunch
Sightseeing mentioned with standard // basic entrance tickets. 
UAE normal 30 Days single entry tourist visa charges. 
Travel insurance for specific period. 
All tours & transfers on Private basis. 
Tourism Dirham tax.
cost_excludes:
GST 5% (Government Tax) on total package cost 
Porterage (Coolie charges), laundry, wines & alcoholic beverages, telephone charges, shopping, all items of personal nature and also food and drinks not forming the part of the group menus. 
Any extra expense such as route change, Airline change, Date change, Accommodation facilities, etc incurred due to the unforeseen, unavoidable forced majeure circumstances during the tour. 
Any unexpected cost arising due to natural calamities e.g. bad weather, landslides, road blockage, political disturbances (strikes), etc. (and has to be paid by travelers directly on the spot). 
Any extra cost incurred on behalf of an individual due to illness, accident, hospitalization, or any  personal emergency .
Anything not specifically mentioned in ‘Tour Price Includes Column.
